{{Infobox location
| name = Iron Legion Hive
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Iron Legion]] [[Hive]] is a massive, central structure that serves as the core of the [[Iron Legion]]'s fleet. These [[Hives]] are characterized by a grotesque fusion of biological matter and machinery, often appearing as bulbous slabs or even planet-sized skulls composed of white skin and black iron. The [[Hives]] function as nurseries for the [[Legion]]'s leadership, capable of birthing an [[Iron King]]. While individual [[Hives]] can be positioned to block celestial travel routes, the most significant is the [[Grand Hive]], a fortress that has housed an [[Iron King]] for over four hundred years. The [[Legion]]'s primary objective is the assimilation of all things into their collective, a drive that motivates them to capture and integrate vessels rather than simply destroying them.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Iron Legion]] utilizes [[Hives]] as central structures within their organization. These [[Hives]] function as complex labyrinths composed of living hallways and possess the capability to give birth to a [[King of the Iron Legion]]. During a raid conducted by the [[Fallen Sword]], the scale of such a [[Hive]] prompted concerns regarding whether an entire unit was being pitted against them. Previously, the narrator had engaged in combat against an [[Iron Legion]] [[Hive]] while fighting on behalf of the [[Vallenar Corporation]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|An [[Iron Legion Hive]] can give birth to a [[King of the Iron Legion]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Iron Legion]] has [[Hives]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4">''The Captain'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The narrator wonders if they are being pitted against an entire [[Iron Legion Hive]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c13">''The Captain'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Fallen Sword]] is raiding an [[Iron Legion Hive]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|An [[Iron Legion Hive]] can be a [[labyrinth]] of living hallways.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c19">''The Captain'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The narrator previously fought against an [[Iron Legion Hive]] on the [[Vallenar Corporation]]'s side.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c27">''The Captain'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“She is in the midst of raiding an Iron Legion Hive…”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
